title: DataTable Selected Row Background Color Update
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want selected rows in data tables to have a subtle green highlight, so that selections are visible without being distracting.
acceptance_criteria: Selected rows in all data tables display #f2fbf9 background
Color override applies globally via custom CSS
Override uses !important to ensure it takes precedence over the DataTables library styles
ux_changes: Selected row background color in DataTables updated to a subtle light green (#f2fbf9) matching the brand palette.
implementation_notes: CSS override added to the custom stylesheet using !important to override the DataTables library defaults.
comment_summary: Developer added the CSS override to the custom stylesheet and confirmed it works correctly.
